summary: Migration 008 upgrades and downgrades cleanly on a temporary SQLite database and locks the Phase 2 labeling schema in DB constraints.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Alembic upgrade head
checks.actual: Upgrade succeeded and alembic current reports 008_add_labeling_tables (head)

checks.name: CHECK-02: New tables exist
checks.command: sqlite3 /tmp/social-listening-phase2.sqlite "select name from sqlite_master where type='table' order by name;"
checks.actual: Tables list includes label_jobs and content_labels

checks.name: CHECK-03: Crawled posts summary columns
checks.actual: pragma table_info(crawled_posts) shows label_status and current_label_id

checks.name: CHECK-04: DB taxonomy constraints locked
checks.command: sqlite3 /tmp/social-listening-phase2.sqlite "select sql from sqlite_master where name in ('label_jobs','content_labels','crawled_posts');"
checks.expected: status and taxonomy enums locked in SQL constraints
checks.actual: label_jobs/content_labels/crawled_posts SQL includes ck_label_jobs_status, uq_label_jobs_run_taxonomy_version, ck_content_labels_* and ck_crawled_posts_label_status

checks.name: CHECK-05: Downgrade then upgrade cleanly
checks.command: cd backend && SQLITE_DB_PATH=/tmp/social-listening-phase2.sqlite venv/bin/alembic downgrade 007_add_crawled_post_metadata && SQLITE_DB_PATH=/tmp/social-listening-phase2.sqlite venv/bin/alembic upgrade head
checks.expected: Downgrade to 007 and upgrade back to 008 succeed
checks.actual: Both commands passed when executed sequentially
